events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: pipe bedding & backfill in progress, observed field condition is "missing tracer wire on non-metallic." This is a sequence violation because tracer wire must be installed on non-metallic pipe before backfilling. Work is actively in progress. Need to stop backfill, install tracer wire.

  "rationale": "Tracer wire must be installed on non-metallic piping prior to bedding and backfill so the line is locatable. Backfilling without it is a sequence violation and creates a non-compliant, defective installation.",
